metadata.description: A reusable, complete ISTQB-aligned QA testing toolkit for Web + API projects, installable across all your repositories.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Complete ISTQB body-of-knowledge toolkit (CTFL v4.0 / CTAL / ISO 29119-3): 60 commands for policy, strategy, plans, risk, estimation, design techniques, automation, automation-project audit, all test types, monitoring, completion and process improvement. Driven by a single qa.config.yml per project.
